items.title: IowaBio panel discussion
items.description: Ratul Chowdhury joins an Iowa Biotechnology Association panel discussion alongside Erin Rollenhagen, Reid Forgrave, and Matthew Smalley.

items.title: Functionalized cellulose for Critical Minerals
items.description: Anionic hairy nanocellulose when optimally functionalized helps selective recovery of lanthanides.
items.imageAlt: Functionalized cellulose for Critical Minerals update

items.title: Seq2Bind for structure-free docking
items.description: Seq2Bind machine learning model enables binding energy prediction and hotspot recovery from single sequences without losing structural awareness.

items.title: PixF fluorescent pixel analytics
items.description: Agrivax.studio releases PixF for rapid, web-based image analytics and segmentation on H5N1 virus.

items.title: DOE Supercomputing Conference SC25
items.description: Chowdhury represents Ames Lab to talk about OpenREEpo+ database of simulations on critical minerals.

items.title: AstraMEV for multi-epitope vaccines
items.description: We build a structural-biology workflow for multi-epitope vaccine design against livestock viruses.
